creator: sec@42.org
text:
As an update to ports/4656 this is an updated version of my sidplay port.

I recall:

A new port "sidplay" which plays sidtunes (that is good old C=64 soundfiles)

More info can be found on:
<http://www.geocities.com/SiliconValley/Lakes/5147/sidplay.html>

Fix: Use this.



--OAA03725.884731190/hub.freebsd.org--
----- End forwarded message -----

-- 
Eine anständige Katze trinkt keinen Whisky, davon kriegt sie ja nen Kater.--sOEyp4VHS0dPyvNaxGUO8J7rEEE37CSEeb9fuawlfDsxKQcb
